    def test_verify_order_details_right_pane(page: Page) -> None:
        """
        Verify clicking an order record displays
        order details in the right-hand pane.
        """
    
        # ==============================================================
        # Test Data
        # ==============================================================
    
        base_url = "https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/auth/login"
        username = "TVKUMAPR"
        password = "TRIPS734"
    
        # ==============================================================
        # STEP 1: Open CCUI URL and login
        # ==============================================================
    
        page.goto(base_url)
    
        expect(page).to_have_url(
            re.compile(r".*/auth/login")
        )
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="User ID"
        ).fill(username)
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="Password"
        ).fill(password)
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Login"
        ).click()
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role("main")
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        expect(page).not_to_have_url(
            re.compile(r".*/auth/login")
        )
    
        # ==============================================================
        # STEP 2: Open Search Order from Quick Actions
        # ==============================================================
    
        search_order_button = page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Search Order"
        )
    
        expect(search_order_button).to_be_visible()
    
        search_order_button.click()
    
        # ==============================================================
        # STEP 3: Verify order grid is displayed
        # ==============================================================
    
        order_grid = page.get_by_role("grid")
    
        expect(order_grid).to_be_visible()
    
        order_ids = get_order_ids(page)
    
        assert len(order_ids) > 0, (
            "No order IDs found in the order grid."
        )
    
        selected_order_id = order_ids[0]
    
        # ==============================================================
        # STEP 4: Click an order record
        # ==============================================================
    
        selected_order_button = order_grid.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name=selected_order_id,
            exact=True
        )
    
        expect(selected_order_button).to_be_visible()
    
        selected_order_button.click()
    
        # ==============================================================
        # STEP 5: Verify details displayed in right pane
        # ==============================================================
